Update IDK why I gave it 5 stars before I don’t have even ever remember making a review but it is boring are heck. (but jiggle physics are really nice wink wink nudge nudge) also “Izzy” is really creepy.

bake her booty jiggle and when u touch her make her react and so u can interact with her bc we all know boys when she came runnin at u we all tried to touch them and let u grip so u make a fist when u hit the ball and so u can grip the babooshkas and then a crowd of other girls jumpin up and down in the crowd
Fun game, it took a few tries to learn how to serve and volley the ball, Lizzy is fun and Perky! I can't wait to see where this game goes, looking forward to an update..

This might not be a bad game if the ball didn’t constantly takeoff into outer space. It’s impossible to Play two consecutive points let alone finished an entire game. The only way to resolve the issue was to restart the game and then it happens again. Fix some of the bugs and this could be a somewhat entertaining game.
I really love jiggle physics 🤤. Pls add more🤤

If they spent as much time on the gameplay as they did on the figure of Izzy, this would be a great game.  Izzy has a firm body with a large bounce where every 12-year-old boy wants it.  Funny how you can "bounce" her boobs and how the string of her bikini is lodged deep into her butt crack.  

There are so many glitches that it's almost impossible to finish one game.  When serving, the little hit will send that ball flying out of bounds, but when you try to return the ball a full-body push/hit to the ball can make the ball just barely move.  One time she served to me and it just went up over my head and continued into the sky and disappeared somewhere out in space.  The game was stuck. No ball, we could not continue.  This is the kind of glitches this game has. 

If you try to "bump" the ball you end up banging your controllers together which can cause them to easily crack and break. 

If they can fix the physics, and glitches and make it a single or multiplayer game this could be great!  



Funny how the five-star ratings all came from within the company who made it, or horny 10-year-old boys.  Everyone else rated it with a one because it is that bad. 

I'd like to see where you can have two or more players on each side.  The title is "Izzy's Beach Games" but there is only ONE game. not games?  I was hoping there would be more than just volleyball.  Maybe badminton, and others?

eight months later and still a piece of garbage.  I guess once they got the boobs to jiggle they just gave up?
It's a free bit of fun while in beta mode, it made me smile

reviews.review_title: The start of a great game
reviews.review_description: Yes there are bugs but it's just a  beta.  And yes I got this game just because of the very pretty and detailed woman.  But after  that wore off I had fun playing volleyball with Izzy. Has I have a small play space it was challenging to hit the ball. But after  losing  10 games  I got the hang of it and won 3 games in a row. I find my self jumping  to the game to  play a round of volleyball with izzy every time I put on my headset.  So fun.To the developers this can be a great game with a little more games to play with  izzy and fix the bugs.  But I love game and izzy. It's so fun to play games with a beautiful woman I hope you keep working on it.  And don't let the neigh sayers  stop you. Thanks for making your game. After you fix the bugs.  You  should send your game to Youtubers to review it.  Good or bad  review's it won't matter its about the views.  Just get it out there to let the people see your game and they will check it out. With the fixes I said  I'd pay to play your game.
I had a lot of fun playing volleyball.  I just want more  games to play with izzy. But it is fun to jump in and play a quick game of volleyball. Keep up the good work.

Y’all didn’t really have to add jiggle physics to her, and yet y’all did and I don’t really like that you did… it doesn’t really make the game any better, but it’s not even that good to begin with!! The hand alignment is so off, I can’t even hit the ball correctly! Please, FIX THIS!

You got my attention when you have a girl in a bikini and volleyball. That’s the positive part.
For the bad news, you really need to do a lot of work to improve it. You should change the arch of the ball for one thing. You got to make a little easier to score.  The list is too long to fix but if you want to sell it do it otherwise withdraw the game.  Listen to your beta users. Answer their feedback.It could be a great game. Good luck.
